name: Privacy-Gated Demonstration-to-Skill
objective: Separate recording, operation extraction, replay, and external-action approvals for a future low-risk synthetic demonstration description.
non_goals: No recording, replay, login, upload, send, payment, deletion, publish, or external write.
inputs: Future customer-approved low-risk synthetic demonstration description.
outputs: Future preview-only operation outline and approval matrix.
excluded_patterns: Browser, visual, screenshot, and web application QA implementations require a separate candidate and execution boundary.
known_gaps: The proposal is platform-gated and does not observe or replay an interaction.
